title: Ari Emanuel on the Future of Entertainment: Hollywood, AI, Creator Economy, YouTube vs Netflix
description:
(0:00) Introducing Ari Emanuel

(1:03) Ari's background in the content business and Hollywood

(4:14) How infinite distribution is changing Hollywood, the future of podcasting, creators owning advertising products

(9:21) AI's impact: anticipating the 3-day workweek

(12:13) Splitting time between TKO and WME, YouTube vs Netflix for creators, modern IP ownership

(18:20) How he got a fighter's reputation, relationship with Michael Ovitz, how he built on Ovitz's vision

(22:12) Future of sports entertainment: adapting to attention spans, clip culture, going global

(24:21) Ari's relationship with his brothers and Elon Musk

Thanks to our partners for making this happen!

analysis.summary: Ari Emanuel discusses the future of entertainment, including the impact of infinite distribution, AI, and the creator economy on Hollywood. He also shares his background and experiences in the industry. The conversation covers topics such as the future of sports entertainment, modern IP ownership, and the role of YouTube and Netflix in the creator economy.

takeaways.text: AI may lead to a 3-day workweek
Modern IP ownership is crucial for creators
Attention spans are adapting in sports entertainment
YouTube and Netflix have different roles in the creator economy
Ari Emanuel built on Michael Ovitz's vision

sentiment.notes: The conversation is forward-looking and focuses on the opportunities and adaptations in the entertainment industry. Ari Emanuel's experiences and insights contribute to a positive and enthusiastic tone.

notable_moments.description: Ari Emanuel discusses the potential impact of AI on workweeks
Ari Emanuel shares his relationship with Michael Ovitz and building on his vision
